wikitext:
{{Event Header|StS2 Spirit Grafter.png}} {{E|Spirit Grafter|2}} is an {{2|Events|Event}} found exclusively in the {{2|Hive}}. == Options == {{Frame|Let It In}} {{TS|positive||Heal 25 HP.}} {{TS|positive||Add {{C|Metamorphosis||2}} to Deck.}}
{{Frame|Rejection}} {{TS|negative||Lose 9 HP.}} {{TS|positive||Remove 1 card from your Deck.}} == Dialogue ==
Above, a cocoon is shaking and wriggling, about to burst forth! ...it stops wriggling. The cocoon ignites! What is going on? In a flash of light and flame, a Spirit Grafter rushes into you, threatening to merge with your being to become complete.
{{Frame|Let It In}}
The Spirit Grafter merges with you. The vital kindred spirit swiftly heals you up. You are reborn.
{{Frame|Rejection}}
The {{TS|gold||Spirit Grafter}} is easily stopped by your will. However, it repeatedly flies into you, desperate for a host. Its strength runs out and it dissolves with a {{TS|purple||poof}}. A fleeting spirit.
[[Category:Events]] [[Category:Slay the Spire 2 Content]]
